structured_payload_candidate.title: Static Pressure Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-fan dual-duct heating VAV AHU supply fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Supply fan speed is controlled to maintain duct static pressure at setpoint when fan is proven ON.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Control supply fan speed to maintain DSP at setpoint. For small Zone Groups, provide multiple sets of gains as a function of load indicator.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Supply fan speed is controlled to maintain DSP at setpoint when the fan is proven ON. Where the Zone Groups served by the system are small, provide multiple sets of gains that are used in the control loop as a function of a load indicator (such as supply-fan airflow rate, the area of the Zone Groups that are occupied, etc.).

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
rejection_reason: weak evidence_quote: section heading without supporting rule

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides for Hot Water Valve
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force hot water valve full open and full closed, interlocked to CHW and hot-water plant level.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Provide software switches to force hot water valve full open and full closed.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify that software switches can force hot water valve full open and full closed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW and hot-water plant level to a. force hot water valve full open and b. force hot water valve full closed.

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW and hot-water plant level to a. force hot water valve full open and b. force hot water valve full closed.
evidence_text: Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW and hot-water plant level to a. force hot water valve full open and b. force hot water valve full closed.
rejection_reason: weak evidence_quote: commissioning evidence lacks procedure/check action
